Claude for Consultants

More clients.
Less time per engagement.

Claude compresses the production work around your expertise — faster research, sharper deliverables, more capacity to take on clients without adding hours.

Get Claude Implemented → How It Works
The consulting margin problem

Your expertise is the product.
Production work is eating the margin.

📋
Deliverable production eats margin
You know what the client needs. Writing it up, formatting it, iterating on it — that's where the hours go.
🔬
Research too slow
Market research, competitive analysis, synthesizing third-party sources — deep work that shouldn't take as long as it does.
📝
Proposals take half a day
Custom proposals for every prospect. The same structure, adapted each time, manually — instead of a process that runs.
🔁
Rebuilding frameworks from scratch
You've solved similar problems before. The frameworks exist in your head — not structured somewhere Claude can reference.
What Claude handles

Six high-leverage use cases
for consulting practices.

01
Deliverable Drafting
Strategy docs, reports, frameworks, assessments — Claude drafts to your structure and voice. You refine rather than write from scratch.
02
Research & Synthesis
Feed Claude sources, documents, transcripts, industry data — get synthesis you'd otherwise spend hours producing.
03
Proposal Generation
A working proposal workflow: intake context, structure the approach, draft the SOW. 30 minutes instead of half a day.
04
Framework Application
Your frameworks and methodologies loaded into Claude Projects — applied consistently across engagements without starting from scratch.
05
Client Communication
Status updates, meeting summaries, follow-up emails — drafted at your level, in your voice, in minutes.
06
Knowledge Base
Your IP, templates, case studies, and methodologies organized so Claude can draw on them in any engagement.
Use Cases

What consultants use Claude for.

Strategy Decks Market Research Competitive Analysis Proposal Writing Client Communications Meeting Summaries Framework Application SOW & Scoping
